---
name: project_scripts_location
description: Script files are stored at youtube/scripts/ with slug-style filenames ending in .md
type: project
---

Scripts are saved to `/Users/taher/Desktop/github/tutorials-notes/youtube/scripts/` using slug-style filenames (lowercase, hyphens, .md extension).

**Why:** User provides the full output path directly rather than relying on auto-generated folder names.

**How to apply:** When user provides a file path, use it exactly. When they don't, follow the naming convention seen here (topic-slug.md in the scripts directory).
